title: dashloader-portinglib-compat
description: A very hacky workaround to get Dashloader working with PortingLib
body:
# Dashloader PortingLib Compat

A very hacky mod to get Dashloader working with PortingLib. Since Dashloader is currently unmaintained, this can be used as a very dirty workaround. This is very easy to break and injects an additional constructor into the ItemTransform class. I am sorry Mixin-Gods.
